course_description.overview: Challenging coastal route along the Italian Riviera with flats, rolling hills, and iconic climbs through seaside villages, vineyards, and panoramic views.

key_segments.name: Colla Micheri
key_segments.description: Steep coastal climb, key difficulty repeated in final circuit.

key_segments.name: Capo Mele
key_segments.description: Rolling ascent similar to Milan-San Remo profile.

key_segments.name: Cipressa
key_segments.description: Early challenging climb with panoramic sea views.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Puncheur-friendly with short, steep coastal ascents and a technical final circuit; tests endurance and positioning on descents.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Genoa or Nice airports, then drive 1-1.5 hours; trains to Albenga station nearby.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels and B&Bs in Laigueglia and Andora; book early for seafront options.
logistics.registration_details: Online via granfondolaigueglia.it; early bird fees, categories by age and performance.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bike transport via airport shuttles or Eurobike; on-site tech support and secure parking.
logistics.local_considerations: Mild late-February weather (10-15°C); closed roads ensure safety; Italian Riviera traffic outside event.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier Italian granfondo with Riviera beauty and punchy climbs.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Amateur road cyclists seeking early-season challenge, puncheurs, and scenery lovers.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the combination of prestige, safety, and Mediterranean vibes.

youtube_data.search_query: Granfondo Laigueglia gran fondo cycling Laigueglia

videos.title: Granfondo Laigueglia 2026, un successo internazionale
videos.description:
La Granfondo Internazionale Laigueglia 2026 ha regalato una giornata spettacolare tra mare, monti e un clima quasi primaverile. In questo video vi porto dentro l’evento, con immagini dal campo, atmosfera di gara e i momenti più significativi della manifestazione organizzata dal GS Alpi.
Oltre 1600 partecipanti hanno affrontato il percorso di 112 km e 1700 metri di dislivello, tracciato con la consueta cura da Vittorio Mevio e dal suo staff. Una giornata di grande ciclismo, resa ancora più speciale dalla presenza del campione olimpico Pascal Richard e dalla tradizionale benedizione impartita da Don Agostino prima della partenza.

Risultati completi: https://ultimochilometro.it/2026/02/22/granfondo-internazionale-laigueglia-2026-fa-il-pieno-di-partecipanti-vittorie-di-nardin-e-bussone/

Se ami il ciclismo, iscriviti al canale: qui trovi contenuti esclusivi dalle gare, interviste, approfondimenti e reportage direttamente sul campo.
videos.curation_reason: Most comprehensive coverage with specific course details (112km, 1700m elevation) and race atmosphere from 1600+ participants.
